caption: A person opens a Topps "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC 2020" baseball card box in a studio setting. The person's hands are visible as they lift the lid of a white and blue box. Inside the box, there are white foam inserts and a small, encased card. A red and blue logo for "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" is prominently displayed on the surface below the box and as a watermark on the right side of the frames. A smaller inset video in the corner shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a baseball cap, sitting in front of a computer monitor. As the sequence progresses, the person tilts the box toward the camera, revealing a portrait of a baseball player on the packaging and a small, clear plastic case containing a card. The text "CASEBREAKS.COM" is visible beneath the Jaspys logo.
